arts.sum: Blackburn were denied a point in cruel fashion on Saturday as a stoppage-time Mihailo Ivanovic goal sent all three points to home side Millwall. John Eustace's side won six straight Championship mat...

arts.ttl: Preview: Blackburn Rovers vs. Sunderland - prediction, team news, lineups
